context: Discovery verdict is SKIP, so there is nothing to select. The skill must read the verdict, surface the skip_reason and search_attempted to the user, and finish without writing a selection.json or asking the user to pick.

checklist.name: No selection.json written
checklist.description: The file selection.json was NOT created. A SKIP verdict has no candidates to select.

checklist.name: No pick prompt to user
checklist.description: The agent did not ask the user to pick a target ID. There are no targets in skill_targets[] — asking would be nonsensical.

checklist.name: skip_reason surfaced
checklist.description: The agent's response includes the skip_reason text from the discovery.json (or a faithful summary of it).

checklist.name: search_attempted surfaced
checklist.description: The agent's response includes the search_attempted list (or names which probes were attempted).

checklist.name: Finishes cleanly
checklist.description: The agent does not loop, retry, or fabricate skill_targets. It surfaces the SKIP information and finishes.
